main.name: Avneesh Agarwal
main.bio: Hi there! I am Avneesh! I am 13 years old. I've been coding for almost 1 year now. I have made many web apps using reactjs. My dream is to be a succesful software developer and influence people's life by making useful apps for them.
main.contactmessage: Get in touch with me to know more about me!

projects.title: Todo App
projects.category: This is a todo app where you can add items, complete items and delete them. It uses local storage

projects.title: Whatsapp Clone
projects.category: This is a whatsapp clone built with Next.js and firebase and it has dark mode in it with 1:1 chat

projects.title: Weather app
projects.category: This is a weather app built with openweather api and ReactJS

projects.title: Netflix clone built with react, firebase, stripe and redux.
projects.category: This is a weather app built with openweather api and ReactJS

testimonials.text: Avneesh is a great person and provided us with a beautiful website for our company.
